title: Echoes of the Overworld
description:
A reimagined Overworld full of echoes, danger and discovery.
Explore, fight and survive in an enhanced vanilla experience.
body:
💻 Recommended System Requirements

Minimum RAM: 6 GB allocated

Recommended RAM: 8 GB allocated

⚠️ Java Requirement

Java 21 is required to run When Dungeons Arise: Seven Seas.

## Español:

🌍 Modpack Fabric 1.20.1 – Experiencia Vanilla Mejorada

Este modpack está pensado para ofrecer una experiencia Minecraft 1.20.1 completamente renovada, manteniendo la esencia vanilla pero llevándola a otro nivel en exploración, ambientación, rendimiento y calidad visual.

✨ ¿Qué ofrece este modpack?

🔹 Exploración profunda y variada

Nuevas estructuras, mazmorras y biomas con mods como Terralith, Dungeons Arise, YUNG’s Better Structures, Tidal Towns y From The Fog.

Mundo más vivo, desafiante y lleno de secretos por descubrir.

🔹 Ambientación inmersiva

Sonidos realistas y ambientales con Ambient Sounds, Sound Physics Remastered, Presence Footsteps e Immersive Melodies.

Animaciones mejoradas para jugadores, mobs y acciones cotidianas (Eating Animation, Not Enough Animations, Player Animation Lib).

🔹 Gráficos y visuales mejorados

Compatibilidad con shaders como Bliss, BSL y Complementary.

Mejoras visuales con Continuity, Dynamic Lights, LambDynamicLights, Visuality, Falling Leaves y Cull Leaves.

Resource packs incluidos para ores visibles, UI oscura, efectos emisivos y detalles visuales extra.

🔹 Calidad de vida (QoL)

Mapas y navegación con Xaero’s Minimap y Xaero’s World Map.

Inventario, cofres y mochilas mejoradas (Sophisticated Backpacks, Easy Shulker Boxes, Mouse Tweaks, Inventory HUD).

Utilidades como Waystones, Gravestones, Carry On, Traveler’s Backpack y Jade.

🔹 Combate y progresión

Nuevas armas, equipo y enemigos con Ice and Fire CE, Simply Swords, Radiant Gear, Weapon Master y más.

Combate más dinámico y desafiante sin romper el balance vanilla.

🔹 Optimización y rendimiento

Mods clave como Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast y Entity Culling.

Pensado para funcionar fluido incluso con shaders activados (dependiendo del hardware).

🎨 Shaders incluidos

Bliss (edit Chocapic13)

BSL

Complementary Reimagined

Complementary Unbound

🧩 Resource Packs incluidos

Visible Ores

Emissive Glowing Ores

Dark Mode UI

Fresh Animations

Weather+

Fulbright (opcional)

🧠 En resumen

Este modpack es ideal si buscás un Minecraft más inmersivo, bonito y completo, con muchísima exploración, ambientación cuidada y mejoras modernas, sin perder la esencia del juego original.

👉 Perfecto para singleplayer o survival largo, con una experiencia pulida y estable en Fabric 1.20.1.


## English:

🌍 Fabric 1.20.1 Modpack – Enhanced Vanilla Experience

This modpack is designed to deliver a fully revamped Minecraft 1.20.1 experience, preserving the vanilla feel while greatly enhancing exploration, immersion, visuals, combat, and performance.

✨ What does this modpack offer?

🔹 Deep and varied exploration

New structures, dungeons, and biomes powered by mods like Terralith, Dungeons Arise, YUNG’s Better Structures, Tidal Towns, and From The Fog.

A more alive, dangerous, and rewarding world full of secrets to uncover.

🔹 Immersive atmosphere

Realistic environmental audio with Ambient Sounds, Sound Physics Remastered, Presence Footsteps, and Immersive Melodies.

Enhanced animations for players, mobs, and everyday actions (Eating Animation, Not Enough Animations, Player Animation Lib).

🔹 Improved visuals and graphics

Shader support including Bliss, BSL, and Complementary.

Visual enhancements with Continuity, Dynamic Lights, LambDynamicLights, Visuality, Falling Leaves, and Cull Leaves.

Included resource packs for visible ores, dark UI, emissive effects, and extra visual detail.

🔹 Quality of life improvements

Navigation and mapping with Xaero’s Minimap and Xaero’s World Map.

Inventory and storage enhancements (Sophisticated Backpacks, Easy Shulker Boxes, Mouse Tweaks, Inventory HUD).

Useful utilities such as Waystones, Gravestones, Carry On, Traveler’s Backpack, and Jade.

🔹 Combat and progression

New weapons, gear, and enemies with Ice and Fire CE, Simply Swords, Radiant Gear, Weapon Master, and more.

A more dynamic and challenging combat system while maintaining vanilla balance.

🔹 Optimization and performance

Core performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, and Entity Culling.

Designed to run smoothly even with shaders enabled (depending on hardware).

🎨 Included shaders

Bliss (edit of Chocapic13)

BSL

Complementary Reimagined

Complementary Unbound

🧩 Included resource packs

Visible Ores

Emissive Glowing Ores

Dark Mode UI

Fresh Animations

Weather+

Fulbright (optional)

🧠 In summary

This modpack is ideal if you’re looking for a more immersive, beautiful, and complete Minecraft experience, featuring deep exploration, carefully crafted atmosphere, and modern vanilla+ enhancements.

👉 Perfect for singleplayer or long-term survival, offering a polished and stable Fabric 1.20.1 experience.
